title: Dogfood: write worktree isolation checklist
description: Create docs/dogfood/tickflow-parallel-approvals/worktree-isolation.md. Document what each parallel worker should and should not touch, how to spot branch/worktree collisions, and cleanup expectations after successful merge. Include headings: # Worktree Isolation Checklist, ## Worker Boundaries, ## Merge Expectations, ## Cleanup Checks.
